name: The Singularity Containment Field
description: Steal the containment token by forcing field inversion and ejection.

flaws.name: Invert Magnetic Polarities
flaws.flavor_text: Invert the magnetic containment coils to reverse the localized quantum gravity coefficients.

flaws.name: Dump Mass
flaws.flavor_text: Dump cargo debris into the singularity. Under inverted polarity, the increased mass drops the gravitational pull to zero, causing the field to flip and eject the token.
